title: Number
subtitle: A double-precision floating-point value. All numeric literals are Numbers.

members.description: Returns the receiver modulus aNumber.
Returns a new number with the bitwise AND of the receiver and aNumber.
Returns a new number that is the product of the receiver and aNumber.
Same as pow(aNumber).
Returns a new number that is the sum of the receiver and aNumber.
Returns a new number that is the difference of the receiver and aNumber.
Returns a new number with the value of the receiver divided by aNumber.

Shifts the bits of the receiver left by the number of places specified by
    aNumber.

Shifts the bits of the receiver right by the number of places specified by
    aNumber.

Returns the bitwise xor with the receiver (both numbers are converted to
    longs for the operation).

members.name: abs
members.description: Returns a number with the absolute value of the receiver.

members.name: acos
members.description: Returns a number with the arc cosine of the receiver.

members.name: asBinary
members.description: Returns the number as binary digits inside a string. 42 asBinary -> "101010"

members.name: asBuffer
members.description:
Returns a Buffer containing a the number of bytes specified by
    optionalNumberOfBytes (up to the size of a double on the platform) of the
    receiver. If no optionalNumberOfBytes is specified, it is assumed to be the
    number of bytes in a double on the host platform.

members.name: asCharacter
members.description:
Returns a String containing a single character whose
    value is the value of the first byte of the receiver.
    Returns nil if the number has no valid UCS mapping.

members.name: asHex
members.description: Returns the number as hex digits inside a string. 97 asHex -> "61"

members.name: asLowercase
members.description: Returns a new Number containing a lower case version of the receiver.

members.name: asNumber
members.description: Returns self.

members.name: asOctal
members.description: Returns the number as octal digits inside a string. 436 asOctal -> "664"

members.name: asString
members.description:
Returns a string representation of the receiver. For example: 
    1234.5678 asString(0, 2)
would return: 
    1234.57

members.name: asUint32Buffer
members.description:
Returns a Sequence containing a 4 byte representation of the uint32 value of
    the receiver.

members.name: asUppercase
members.description: Returns a new Number containing a upper case version of the receiver.

members.name: asin
members.description: Returns a number with the arc sine of the receiver.

members.name: at
members.description:
Returns a new Number containing 1 if the receiver cast to a long
    has its bit set to 1 at bitIndexNumber. Otherwise returns 0.

members.name: atan
members.description: Returns a number with the arc tangent of the receiver.

members.name: atan2
members.description:
Returns a number with the arc tangent of y/x where y is the receiver and x
    is aNumber.

members.name: between
members.description:
Returns true if the receiver's value is between or
    equal to aNumber1 and aNumber2, otherwise returns false.

members.name: bitwiseAnd
members.description: Returns a new number with the bitwise AND of the receiver and aNumber.

members.name: bitwiseComplement
members.description:
Returns a new number with the bitwise complement of the
    receiver. (The 0 bits become 1s and the 1 bits become 0s. )

members.name: bitwiseOr
members.description: Returns a new number with the bitwise AND of the receiver and aNumber.

members.name: bitwiseXor
members.description: Returns a new number with the bitwise XOR of the receiver and aNumber.

members.name: ceil
members.description:
Returns a number with the receiver's value rounded up to
    the nearest integer if its fractional component is greater than 0.

members.name: clip
members.description:
Returns self if the receiver is between aNumber1 and aNumber2.
    Returns aNumber1 if it is less than aNumber1. Returns aNumber2 if it is
    greater than aNumber2.

members.name: combinations
members.description: Returns the combinations where the receiver is the number of different objects and size is the number to be arranged.

members.name: constants
members.description: Object containing number constants e, inf, nan and pi.

members.name: cos
members.description: Returns the cosine of the receiver.

members.name: cubed
members.description: Returns the cube of the receiver.

members.name: doubleMin
members.description: Returns the minimum double precision float value.

members.name: e
members.description: Returns the constant e.

members.name: exp
members.description: Returns e to the power of the receiver.

members.name: factorial
members.description: Returns the factorial of the receiver.

members.name: floatMax
members.description: Returns the maximum double precision float value.

members.name: floatMin
members.description: Returns the minimum float value.

members.name: floor
members.description:
Returns a number with the receiver's value rounded
    down to the nearest integer if its fractional component is not 0.

members.name: inf
members.description: Returns a not-a-number constant.

members.name: integerMax
members.description: Returns the maximum integer value.

members.name: integerMin
members.description: Returns the minimum integer value.

members.name: isAlphaNumeric
members.description:
Returns true if
    receiver is an alphanumeric character value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isControlCharacter
members.description:
Returns true if
    receiver is a control character value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isDigit
members.description:
Returns true if
    receiver is a numeric digit value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isEven
members.description:
Returns true if
    integer form of the receiver is even
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isGraph
members.description:
Returns true if
    the receiver is a printing character value except space
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isHexDigit
members.description:
Returns true if
    the receiver is a hexadecimal character value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isInASequenceSet
members.description: Return true if receiver is in one of the Sequence sequenceSets, otherwise false.

members.name: isLetter
members.description:
Returns true if
    receiver is a letter character value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isLowercase
members.description:
Returns true if
    the receiver is a lowercase character value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isNan
members.description: Returns true if the receiver is not a number. Otherwise returns false.

members.name: isOdd
members.description:
Returns true if
    integer form of the receiver is odd
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isPrint
members.description:
Returns true if
    the receiver is a printing character value, including space
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isPunctuation
members.description:
Returns true if
    the receiver is a punctuation character value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: isSpace
members.description:
Returns true if
    the receiver is a space, formfeed, newline carriage return, tab or vertical
    tab character value , false otherwise.

members.name: isUppercase
members.description:
Returns true if
    the receiver is a uppercase character value
    , false otherwise.

members.name: justSerialized
members.description: Writes the receiver's code into the stream.

members.name: log
members.description:
Returns the logarithm of the receiver.  The base
    is taken as the value of the first argument or the constant e if
    the first argument is omitted.

members.name: log10
members.description: Returns the base 10 logarithm of the receiver.

members.name: log2
members.description: Returns the base 2 logarithm of the receiver.

members.name: longMax
members.description: Returns the maximum long value.

members.name: longMin
members.description: Returns the minimum long value.

members.name: max
members.description: Returns the greater of the receiver and aNumber.

members.name: min
members.description: Returns the lesser of the receiver and aNumber.

members.name: minMax
members.description: Returns a number between or equal to low and high. If the receiver is equal to or between low and high, the receiver is returned. If the receiver is less than low, low is returned. If the receiver is greater than high, high is returned.

members.name: mod
members.description: Returns the receiver modulus aNumber.

members.name: nan
members.description: Returns a infinity constant.

members.name: negate
members.description: Returns new number that is negated version of the receiver.

members.name: permutations
members.description: Returns the permutations where the receiver is the number of different objects and size is the number to be arranged.

members.name: pi
members.description: Returns the constant pi.

members.name: pow
members.description: Returns the value of the receiver to the aNumber power.

members.name: print
members.description: Prints the number.

members.name: repeat
members.description:
Evaluates message a number of times that corresponds to the receivers
    integer value. This is significantly faster than a for() or while() loop.

members.name: round
members.description:
Returns a number with the receiver's value rounded up to
    the nearest integer if its fraction component is >= .5 or rounded up to the
    nearest integer otherwise.

members.name: roundDown
members.description:
Returns a number with the receiver's value rounded down to
    the nearest integer if its fraction component is <= .5 or rounded up the the
    nearest integer otherwise.

members.name: shortMax
members.description: Returns the maximum short value.

members.name: shortMin
members.description: Returns the minimum short value.

members.name: sin
members.description: Returns the sine of the receiver.

members.name: sqrt
members.description: Returns the square root of the receiver.

members.name: squared
members.description: Returns the square of the receiver.

members.name: tan
members.description: Returns the tangent of the receiver.

members.name: toBase
members.description: Returns the number in another base. 42 toBase(2) -> "101010"

members.name: toBaseWholeBytes
members.description: Returns the number in another base printing out entire bytes. 42 toBaseWholeBytes(2) -> "00101010"

members.name: toggle
members.description: Returns 1 if the receiver is 0. Returns 0 otherwise.

members.name: unsignedIntMax
members.description: Returns the maximum unsigned int value.

members.name: unsignedLongMax
members.description: Returns the maximum unsigned long value.

members.name: unsignedShortMax
members.description: Returns the minimum unsigned int value.
Returns a new number with the bitwise OR of the receiver and aNumber.
